completed_tasks.name: Fix central admin auth in tests
Fix stale test assertions and cascade teardown

decisions.decision: Route to verifyViaCloudflare when CF enabled, even without hostname ID
decisions.rationale: Domains predating CF linkage need hostname creation on checkStatus

decisions.decision: Wrap Mockery::close() in try-finally before parent::tearDown()
decisions.rationale: Mockery exceptions prevented RefreshDatabase rollback, cascading 20+ failures

decisions.decision: Use TenantModuleRegistry instead of JSON blob attributes in E2E tests
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 moved to module_installations table; old attributes no longer read

next_action: All 3 security hardening phases complete, 96 tests passing. Commit changes, then tackle deferred MAJOR-01 through MAJOR-05 from the audit in the next milestone.
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 (Security Hardening) is complete. All 3 critical issues fixed: C1 central admin auth, C2 module ZIP upload security, C3 module state persistence. Test suite went from 42 failures to 0. The 42 failures were caused by cascading issues from the action class refactoring (1364ec9) — stale middleware references, missing CF config, Mockery teardown cascade, and Phase 3 data model changes not reflected in E2E tests. All fixed. Ready to commit and move to next milestone.
